assertions.title: Roles List Renders with Permissions

steps.expected: Roles table with role names and permission counts
steps.observed: Roles table renders with 5 roles: ROLE_ADMIN (7 perms), ROLE_ACCOUNTING (3), ROLE_FACTORY (3), ROLE_SALES (1), ROLE_DEALER (1)
Detail panel opens showing ROLE_ADMIN with 7 permissions: portal:factory, payroll.run, factory.dispatch, portal:accounting, portal:sales, portal:dealer, dispatch.confirm

assertions.issues: Dates show 'Invalid Date' for Created and Updated fields in role detail panel

assertions.title: Create Role with Permissions

steps.observed: No Create Role button found. Page displays: 'Role creation is managed by platform administrators. Contact your platform team to add new roles.'

steps.action: Attempt to find Create Role form
steps.expected: Form with name, description, permission checkboxes
steps.observed: No create role functionality available for tenant admin. Role creation is restricted to platform administrators (superadmin).

assertions.issues: Create Role is not available for tenant admin (ROLE_ADMIN). The page explicitly states role creation is managed by platform administrators. This may be by design (RBAC restriction) but the assertion assumes a create form should exist.

assertions.title: Companies List Shows Active Tenants

steps.expected: DataTable shows companies with status badges
steps.observed: DataTable renders with 1 company: MOCK (Mock Training Co), status: Inactive badge
Search filter works correctly — shows 'No companies found' when filtering with non-matching text
Company row reappears after clearing filter

assertions.issues: Only 1 company in test data (MOCK). Status shows 'Inactive' which may be a data issue rather than a UI issue. Company code, name, email, GST, and status columns all present.

assertions.title: Company Detail Shows Full Information

steps.observed: 1 company row rendered (MOCK - Mock Training Co)

steps.action: Click on company row for detail view
steps.expected: Detail view shows company info, subscription, users count, settings
steps.observed: Company rows are not clickable — no onclick handler on table rows. No /admin/companies/:id route exists in the frontend.

Edit Company dialog opens with form fields: Company Name (Mock Training Co), Company Code (MOCK, disabled), Email, Phone, Address, GST Number. No subscription, users count, or settings information shown.

assertions.issues: No company detail page exists. There is no /admin/companies/:id route. The only way to view company info is through the Edit Company dialog, which shows a simple edit form without subscription info, user count, or settings sections. The assertion expects a full detail view that does not exist in the current implementation.

assertions.title: Settings Page Renders Configuration Sections

steps.observed: Settings page renders with 4 sections: General (Company Name, Currency, Timezone, Date Format), Approvals (Auto-Approval Threshold, Period Lock, Export Approval Required), Email (SMTP Host, SMTP Port, From Email, From Name, Email Notifications), Advanced (CORS Allowed Origins)

steps.action: Check for interactive elements / save button
steps.observed: No interactive elements on page — all values display as read-only text. Page states: 'Global settings are managed by platform administrators.' This is expected for tenant admin since PUT /admin/settings requires SUPER_ADMIN.

assertions.issues: All settings values display as '—' (dash), indicating either the backend returns null/empty values or the GET endpoint doesn't return setting data for tenant admin. The page is read-only for tenant admin (expected per task note). No save button present.

assertions.title: Portal Insights Dashboard View

steps.expected: Dashboard with charts, key metrics, trends
steps.observed: Dashboard renders with tab navigation (Dashboard, Operations, Workforce) and Key Highlights section showing 3 metrics: Revenue run rate (₹1180.00, Last 30d: ₹0.00), Fulfilment SLA (0.0%, Awaiting fulfilment data), Dealer coverage (3 Connected dealer entities)

assertions.issues: Dashboard shows key metrics but limited chart/trend data in the visible area. The page is not empty — it renders metrics. Fulfilment SLA shows 'Awaiting fulfilment data' suggesting some data hasn't been populated yet.

frictions.description: Role detail panel shows 'Invalid Date' for Created and Updated timestamps — likely a date parsing issue from the backend response
frictions.resolution: Not resolved — appears to be a frontend date formatting bug

frictions.description: Settings page displays all values as '—' (dash) rather than actual values or meaningful placeholders
frictions.resolution: Not resolved — may be backend returning empty settings or tenant admin not having read access to settings values

blockers.description: VAL-ADMIN-010: Create Role form not available for tenant admin. Page states role creation is managed by platform administrators. No create button or form exists for ROLE_ADMIN users.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Searched for any clickable element that could trigger role creation — none found. The restriction appears intentional per RBAC design.

summary: Tested 6 assertions: 4 passed, 1 failed (VAL-ADMIN-012: no company detail page exists), 1 blocked (VAL-ADMIN-010: create role restricted to platform admin). Key findings: roles page renders well with expandable permissions; companies list works but lacks a detail view page; settings page renders read-only for tenant admin; portal insights shows key metrics dashboard.
